en.name: Australia
en.highlights: Australian Digital Health Agency mandates FHIR for My Health Record. National FHIR implementation guides published. 85%+ of GPs connected.

zh-cn.name: 澳大利亚
zh-cn.highlights: 澳大利亚数字健康局强制要求 My Health Record 使用 FHIR。已发布国家级 FHIR 实施指南。85% 以上全科医生已接入。

en.name: Singapore
en.highlights: National Electronic Health Record (NEHR) integrating FHIR. Smart Nation initiative driving health data standards. Strong government investment in digital health infrastructure.

zh-cn.name: 新加坡
zh-cn.highlights: 国家电子健康记录（NEHR）正在整合 FHIR。智慧国家计划推动健康数据标准化。政府大力投资数字健康基础设施。

en.name: Japan
en.highlights: MHLW promoting standardized health data exchange. HL7 FHIR JP Core published. Major hospital systems piloting SMART on FHIR applications.

zh-cn.name: 日本
zh-cn.highlights: 厚生劳动省推进标准化健康数据交换。HL7 FHIR JP Core 已发布。大型医院系统正在试点 SMART on FHIR 应用。

en.name: South Korea
en.highlights: HIRA driving interoperability standards. Growing FHIR adoption in major hospital networks. Active HL7 Korea chapter.

zh-cn.name: 韩国
zh-cn.highlights: 健保审查评估院推动互操作性标准。主要医院网络 FHIR 采纳增长中。HL7 韩国分会活跃。

en.name: Taiwan
en.highlights: National Health Insurance integrating FHIR. Active FHIR community with government support. Hospital Information System modernization underway.

zh-cn.name: 中国台湾
zh-cn.highlights: 全民健保正在整合 FHIR。在政府支持下拥有活跃的 FHIR 社区。医院信息系统现代化进行中。

en.name: India
en.highlights: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM) adopting FHIR. Unified Health Interface being developed. Massive scale opportunity with 1.4B population.

zh-cn.name: 印度
zh-cn.highlights: Ayushman Bharat 数字健康使命（ABDM）采纳 FHIR。统一健康接口开发中。14 亿人口带来巨大规模机遇。

en.name: Thailand
en.highlights: Thailand 4.0 digital strategy includes health IT modernization. Growing interest in FHIR standards. Medical tourism sector driving interoperability needs.

zh-cn.name: 泰国
zh-cn.highlights: 泰国 4.0 数字战略包含健康 IT 现代化。对 FHIR 标准兴趣日增。医疗旅游行业推动互操作性需求。

en.name: Indonesia
en.highlights: SATUSEHAT national health data platform launched. 270M population with vast underserved areas. Digital health startup ecosystem growing rapidly.

zh-cn.name: 印度尼西亚
zh-cn.highlights: SATUSEHAT 国家健康数据平台已启动。2.7 亿人口中存在大量服务不足地区。数字健康创业生态快速增长。
